stories.title: Saudis must recognise Israel for nuclear deal, says Trump
stories.summary: The US president says the landmark agreement to help Saudis develop nuclear energy is dependent on it joining the Abraham Accords.

stories.title: Yemen's Houthis attack Saudi tanker as US launches more Iran strikes
stories.summary: The Iran-backed group, which previously announced a "maritime embargo" against Saudi Arabia, also claims to have hit another vessel.

stories.title: France evacuates 20,000 as wildfires spread in south-west
stories.summary: Most of those evacuated were tourists from campsites around Arcachon Bay in France's Gironde region.

stories.title: 'I am still alive': Indian activist on hunger strike for 26 days loses 11kg

stories.title: Canada's 'powerful' dairy sector is in Trump's trade crosshairs
stories.summary: Canada's dairy supply management system is in the spotlight after the US president singled it out as one of three main irritants used to justify new tariffs.

stories.title: Russia's businesses under strain from Ukraine's attacks on Wildberries
stories.summary: Ukrainian drones have hit several retail warehouses belonging to Russia's biggest online retailer Wildberries in a matter of days.

stories.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
stories.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.

stories.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
stories.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

stories.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
stories.summary: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on Colombia.

stories.title: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
stories.summary: The Yen and Swiss Franc were stronger against the dollar as investors sought safe havens after Chinese start-up DeepSeek’s new AI model hit U.S. tech stocks.

stories.title: Kevin Warsh has homed in on three key phrases. How Fed watchers interpret them
stories.summary: In five public appearances, Warsh has used the phrase "family fight" 13 times, returning to "first principles" 11 times and "inflation is a choice" for the Fed six times.

stories.title: Trump plans generic drug tariffs from 2028 with two-year delay testing U.S. onshoring push
stories.summary: The latest tariff salvo underscored Trump's goal of reshoring low-cost drug production, but displacing established suppliers like India won't be easy.

stories.title: Import prices post surprise gain as costs of goods from China hit highest since 2008
stories.summary: Import prices were up 0.3% for the month, as a drop in energy was more than offset by increases elsewhere.

stories.title: World Cup gave bars and restaurants a needed boost as consumers flash warning signs, Fed says
stories.summary: The latest edition of the Fed's Beige Book indicated that the soccer tournament wasn't necessarily translating to broader economic growth.

stories.title: Wholesale prices unexpectedly declined 0.3% in June on big drop in gasoline
stories.summary: As with consumer prices, the index benefited from easing energy costs, particularly as oil fell due to the brief pause in tensions between the U.S. and Iran.

stories.title: Renewed Hormuz hostilities drive ECB rates rethink amid ‘extremely volatile’ outlook
stories.summary: Several consecutive days of strikes exchanged between the U.S. and Iran have cast uncertainty on the European Central Bank's interest rate decision next week.

stories.title: White House report says Trump can usher in a "new golden age" of science
stories.summary: The resulting report is a near-random mixture of real problems and grievances.

stories.title: I wanted a clock that never needed setting. Things escalated.

stories.title: ISPs' long nightmare of having to list all the fees they charge is finally over

stories.title: Strategy-led group pledges $15M to quantum-proof Bitcoin network

stories.title: Binance joins STOP THE TRAFFIK in anti-human trafficking effort
stories.summary: The partnership expands Binance’s compliance efforts by providing intelligence and training to help detect cryptocurrency activity tied to human trafficking and child exploitation.

stories.title: BitMEX token crashes 90% as exchange announces shutdown
stories.summary: BitMEX’s BMEX token plunged about 90% after the exchange announced plans to shut down, ending nearly 12 years in business as its Bitcoin futures market share shrank.

stories.title: Bitget secures license for New Zealand expansion
stories.summary: Crypto exchange Bitget said it was registered as a financial service provider with New Zealand’s financial regulator, enabling it to expand its services in the country.
